ksa_text: Knowledge of API design patterns and communication protocols for data services, including REST architectural constraints, GraphQL query language and schema design, gRPC service definitions and protocol buffers, WebSocket real-time communication, message queue protocols for asynchronous integration, authentication and authorization mechanisms, and API versioning strategies.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: knowledge maps directly to core Data Engineer scope — DE-specific signals detected ("schemas?", "graphql", "message queue"). STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.3819); note that framework scores routinely underweight technical execution KSAs for this role, so text-based signal carries primary weight. Seniority is appropriate for IC-to-senior-IC: the KSA describes technical practice, not organizational strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 2 match(es) in DE job postings or certification scope. Skill appears in DE role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
